data.body: FLAKY-CI ROOT CAUSE (investigation done): main is RED repo-wide on test_enrich_queue_prune_never_drops_concurrent_locked_writes — fails ~9/12 recent main pushes incl. the fix commit 485873652's own post-merge CI (lost=17). Root cause: init.py re-enabled background git auto-gc (commit f63d72662 'WU-1'); under heavy parallel commit load a detached 'gc --auto' prunes loose objects concurrently with writers -> 'invalid object / Error building trees' on locked commit -> write dropped. Mode-D recovery (485873652) cut damage 6-8x (146->~17) but doesn't cover HEAD-reachable vanished objects (read-tree HEAD reinstates the broken ref; one-shot, no loop). CONSEQUENCE: friction (not absolute blocker) on every Gerrit landing; recheck passes probabilistically. CAPTURED as bug bfe1-309d (heated-chattable-waterbug), linked discovered_from R6 5dac, with full diagnosis + fix direction (force gc.auto=0 on write path / harden Mode-D to HEAD-reachable + bounded loop). NOT claimed — out of epic-6982 plan-review scope + delicate concurrency code + partial-reverts deliberate f63d72662; parked for maintainer/operator decision. Continuing epic via recheck-when-flake-hits. R6 #760 recheck running. E2 BLOCK (COH/G6 test-file inconsistency, NOT portability) remediated -> re-review round2 running. E6 harness build delegated to subagent.
